query:
SELECT ce.id, ce.alunoId, a.name AS aluno, ce.nomeCiclo, ce.dataInicio, ce.dataFim, ce.status
FROM ciclos_execucao ce
JOIN alunos a ON ce.alunoId = a.id
JOIN turmas t ON a.turmaId = t.id
WHERE t.name LIKE '%BS2%' OR t.name LIKE '%bs2%'
ORDER BY a.name, ce.dataInicio
LIMIT 50;
